title: Compactness via Finite Intersection Property
description: A diagram illustrating the equivalence between compactness of a metric space and the finite intersection property for closed sets.
elements: Collection of Closed Sets {F_α} with the F.I.P.
relationships: A metric space is compact IF AND ONLY IF every collection of closed sets with the Finite Intersection Property (F.I.P.) has a non-empty total intersection.
